message:
fix(patrol): fix step-drift bugs and harden for production

- Fix showstopper: BD_DOLT_BRANCH → BD_BRANCH (matching codebase convention)
- Fix Dolt access: query branches via SQL server instead of CLI against data dir
- Remove dead progress byte-slice code in renderStepDriftPretty
- Add --rig flag for targeted single-rig scans
- Add --peek flag (opt-in) instead of unconditional tmux capture
- Add error field to JSON output for diagnosability
- Add signal handling for --watch graceful shutdown
- Improve test coverage: fuzzy name matching, case insensitivity, edge cases

Original-Author: chrismilleruk <chrismilleruk@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
